prompt: Create a full-body cinematic fashion portrait of Asuka Langley Soryu reimagined as a solitary, regal figure in a cold abandoned concrete ruin. She has long flowing fiery red-orange hair with small red twin hair clips, pale skin, a slim elegant silhouette, and a distant, composed pose; keep the face softly obscured or minimally detailed rather than sharply recognizable. Dress her in a monochrome midnight ink-blue vertical silhouette: a sleeveless Fortuny Delphos–inspired pleated silk column gown with a wide shallow boat neckline, ankle-to-calf length, subtle glossy highlights, and extremely fine vertical pleats continuing the body line. Add matching tonal silk stockings and minimalist pointed-toe high-heel pumps inspired by Manolo Blahnik BB, all in the same dark blue palette so the dress, hosiery, and shoes form one uninterrupted line. She stands slightly turned beside a massive weathered concrete pillar, one hand resting lightly on the pillar and the other relaxed at her side, legs crossed at the ankles. The environment is a vast derelict industrial interior with many tall concrete columns receding into the background, peeling surfaces, exposed rusted rebar, rubble, dead weeds, shallow reflective water on the floor, and bluish fog. Use cold blue moonlit haze with soft shafts of light from the upper left, wet reflections, high-fashion editorial realism, dramatic depth, muted blue-gray ruins, and a quiet queenlike atmosphere that feels distant, elegant, and razor-sharp. Vertical 2:3 composition, full body visible from head to shoes, realistic fabric texture, cinematic color grading, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
